sourceTitle: Using artificial intelligence (AI) in assessments and for studying
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Category 1: prohibited (not allowed) - You cannot use AI tools at all, including spelling and grammar checkers. Category 2: minimal (a little) - You can use AI tools for spelling and grammar check. You can use it for rewording occasional phrases, but not sentences, large parts of text or paragraphs. Category 3: selective (certain tasks) - AI tools can be used in certain ways. Your lecturer will tell you what you can use it for. Category 4: integral (important) - AI tools are needed for the assessment.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: Four AI assessment categories: prohibited, minimal, selective, integral
